chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No.D-8340 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.36776/2019: 2. For hearing of main case: 23.01.2020: Malik Naeem Iqbal, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG. Mr. Awais Alam, Assistant Director FIA Zonal Office, Karachi ----------- After hearing learned counsel for the petitioners, learned DAG and Mr. Awais Alam, Assistant Director FIA, it appears that it is an admitted position that 51 persons were to be promoted out of which 39 have already been promoted and there are still 12 vacancies. Mr. Awais Alam, Assistant Director FIA present on behalf of respondents 2 and 3 states that the cases of the present petitioners will be considered in the next DPC and will be decided as per the seniority rules and the law. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied with the above statement and seeks disposal of the present petition in terms thereof. By consent, the petition and listed application stand disposed of with direction to the respondents to decide the cases of the petitioners within four weeks from today. Needless to say that proper meeting of the DPC shall be held for this purpose and cases of the petitioners shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. There will no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
